confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.legacyBehavior: Tool execution produces a renderable tool card payload
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.playwrightCase: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.why: Playwright asserts user-visible artifact card rendering in the UI (including card content and interaction state) rather than only backend payload shape.

confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.legacyBehavior: Builtin tool calls resolve to a valid renderer path
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.playwrightCase: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::validates artifact rendering flow with UI assertions
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.why: UI-level assertions validate that the builtin tool call resolves into a rendered tool card users can see and interact with, preserving renderer-path confidence at the surface layer.

confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.legacyBehavior: Approval-required tool calls gate execution and respond to user approval decisions
playwrightCase: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::validates approval deny path and rejects false-success output
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.why: Coverage now includes both positive and negative approval outcomes with explicit UI assertions for controls, denied state, and false-success prevention.

confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.legacyBehavior: Generated content remains persisted and retrievable after completion
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.playwrightCase: tests/playwright/artifact-approval.e2e.ts::keeps generated tool output visible after page reload in the same session
confidenceCriticalScenarioParity.why: Playwright verifies user-visible persistence across reload in the same browser session, preserving chat identity and rendered content visibility after navigation refresh.
